title: Record a TUI UX improvement contract
prompt: Create reports/tui-ux-contract.md with sections for visible evidence, keyboard path, token budget, and rollback proof.

fixtureActions.content:
# TUI UX Contract

## Visible Evidence
transcript glances: thinking 4 · command 4 · result 3; footer badges for web/office/media/ZDR/context

## Keyboard Path
Shift-Tab Ultrawork · ctrl+o expand thinking/tools · ctrl+t expand todos · /status · /bench

## Token Budget
premium ambient ~30fps; tool progress cap 8; Context OS inject ≤3500; WebSearch 3; Context7 8/12k

## Rollback Proof
research-aligned compaction soft 0.80 / hard 0.92; densify thrash (1ms ambient, soft≈1%) rejected by ladder safety
